title: DrumBurp: Translate README to English and archive Spanish
original_text: Done. The original Spanish README is now README_ES.md and the new README.md is a faithful English translation. The reference at the bottom points to migration_report_pyqt5.md (the English version of the migration report) instead of the Spanish one.
expected_subject: docs(i18n): translate README to English and archive Spanish
expected_body_lines: - Rename original README to README_ES.md for preservation
- Create new English README.md with faithful translation
- Update internal links to point to English migration report
- Ensure consistent language across primary project documentation
expected_command: git commit -m "docs(i18n): translate README to English and archive Spanish"
